title: 那维莱特Mod
description: 添加了来自《原神》中的角色那维莱特作为可玩角色，那维莱特拥有独特的生命值变动机制，特殊的胜利方式以及多样的流派搭配。并添加了ACT4，以及“吞星之鲸”作为最终Boss。

localizedDescriptions.english: Added Neuvillette from Genshin Impact as a playable character. He features unique HP fluctuation mechanics, special victory conditions, and diverse build options. Additionally, Act 4 has been introduced, featuring the "All-Devouring Narwhal" as the final boss.
